text:
aquired new ASUS M2NPV-VM with "dual core CPU +3800.

All works well inlcusive installation.

Is there a sound driver for this board yet? I was told that there is one in CURRENT.

IN ASUS Manual there is:

High Definition Audio:
SoundMax (R) ADI AD1986A 5.1-channel CODEC
Supports Jack Sensing technology
S/PDIF out interface
